title: VimFu — Ctrl-X Ctrl-O Omni Completion
description: Ctrl-X Ctrl-O triggers omni completion — language-aware smart completion.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Control X Control O triggers omni completion. This is language-aware completion. It understands your programming language.
With proper language support, omni completion knows about methods, properties, and types. For Python, it can suggest attributes after a dot.
In practice, most Neovim users use L S P for this kind of smart completion. But Control X Control O is the built-in way, no plugins required.
The quality depends on the omni function set for your file type. HTML and CSS have good built-in omni functions. Other languages vary.
Control X Control O. Omni completion. Language-aware smart completion built into Vim. For modern Neovim, L S P usually replaces this.
